summary: Frontend-only testing completed for teacher task assignment and student notification features. All 8 requested features verified and working correctly.

issues:
Minor: Console hydration warning about nested
inside

- Badge component inside DialogDescription. Not causing functional issues but should be addressed for cleaner HTML.

critical_code_review_comments: TeacherPanel.jsx line 217-220: DialogDescription contains a Badge component (renders as div), causing HTML validation warning. Consider using <span> wrapper or moving Badge outside DialogDescription.
notificationStore.js getNotificationsForStudent default studentId='student-1' hardcoded - might cause issues if actual studentId differs from mock data.
seed_data_creation: Test notifications created in localStorage for testing: chess_notifications and chess_assignments keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher flow: / -> Ingresar -> Profesor -> click student card -> evaluation modal -> 'Asignar tarea' button. Student flow: / -> Ingresar -> Alumno -> bell icon in header -> /notificaciones. Key data-testid attributes: assign-category-select, assign-level-select, assign-exercise-select, assign-due-date, assign-message, send-task-btn, notifications-bell-btn, notification-badge, notifications-page, mark-all-read-btn, back-btn, empty-notifications

teacher_assignment_dialog.details: Clicking student card opens evaluation dialog. Clicking 'Asignar tarea' opens assignment dialog with all required fields: Categoría select, Nivel select, Ejercicio select, Fecha límite input, Mensaje textarea

teacher_assignment_submission.details: Selected Categoría='Mate', Nivel='4', Ejercicio='1', typed message -> Clicked 'Enviar tarea' -> Toast 'Tarea asignada a Sofía Martínez' appeared at top-right -> Dialog closed

notification_storage.details: After assignment, localStorage.chess_notifications contains notification with correct data: title='Nueva tarea asignada', body='Tu profesor te asigno: Mate – Nivel 4 – Ejercicio 1', deepLink='/entrenamiento/practica?level=4&exercise=1', read=false

assignment_storage.details: localStorage.chess_assignments contains assignment record with studentId, category, level, exercise, message, status='pending'

student_notifications_bell.details: Student home page shows bell icon (data-testid='notifications-bell-btn') with red badge showing unread count

student_notifications_page.details: Clicking bell navigates to /notificaciones. Page shows notification with title 'Nueva tarea asignada', body containing assignment details, blue dot for unread status, 'Leer todo' button for mark all read

notification_read_status.details: Clicking notification marks it as read (localStorage updated, blue dot disappears), navigates to deep link URL

deep_link_navigation.details: Notification deep link correctly navigates to /entrenamiento/practica?level=4&exercise=1. Level 4 is selected, Exercise 1 is active, correct checkmate puzzle displayed

mark_all_read.details: 'Leer todo' button marks all notifications as read, button disappears after all read

empty_notifications.details: When no unread notifications, badge not shown on bell icon. Empty state shows 'Sin notificaciones' message with helper text
